channel.title: Migration on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Migration on Pi Stack

item.title: gh-ost vs pt-online-schema-change vs MariaDB Online DDL: Zero-Downtime MySQL Schema Migration 2026
item.description: When your production MySQL database hits millions of rows, a simple ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN can lock the table for hours — blocking all reads and writes. Zero-downtime schema migration tools solve this by rewriting the table in the background while serving traffic from the original table, then swapping them atomically.
